prompt: A candid street photograph of a young woman walking through a Shanghai longtang alley beneath criss-crossed overhead clotheslines, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. Half-body framing, slight upward angle — she tilts her head up with a bright unguarded expression as a piece of laundry grazes her shoulder. East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, slightly elongated eye corners — eyes raised with a gleam of surprised amusement, lashes catching the lane light. Straight refined nose with a delicate bridge. Skin tone fair to light beige — skin subsurface scattering visible under diffused alley light, specular micro-highlights on cheekbones and nose ridge, fine foundation powder grain perceptible. Light summer makeup, faint coral lip, mascara only, natural finish. She wears a white cotton broderie anglaise mini dress with a square neck and short puff sleeves, lightly lined and breathable. Platform espadrille sandals. A tiny pearl-clasp shoulder bag hangs delicately at her hip. Overhead: strings of neighborhood laundry hang between the upper-floor windows — faded floral shirts, children's clothes, an old striped towel — the real unfiltered domestic texture of longtang life. The narrow alley walls of dark old brick close on both sides, worn and patched. Through the thin strip of sky visible above the lane between the rooflines and the hanging laundry, the faint blurred crown of a modern residential tower breaks softly through — present as a quiet reminder of the city beyond the lane. Two or three stray hairs lifted by the upward movement and faint lane air, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical. Overcast shade-diffused summer daylight channeled down through the narrow lane, even soft illumination, no harsh shadows — the deep old bricks take on a warm amber tone. Spontaneous, mid-laugh energy, unguarded natural expression — the Shanghai girl caught between her perfect posture and a moment of pure delight. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 2:3. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.
